name: HashiCorp Vault
description: HashiCorp Vault is a secrets management and data protection platform. Use this API to store and retrieve secrets, manage encryption keys, handle dynamic credentials, and configure authentication and authorization policies.

capabilities.name: read_secret
capabilities.description: Read a secret from a KV (key-value) secrets engine.

capabilities.name: write_secret
capabilities.description: Store or update a secret in a KV secrets engine.

capabilities.name: list_secrets
capabilities.description: List secret keys at a given path in the secrets engine.

capabilities.name: manage_auth_methods
capabilities.description: Enable, configure, and manage authentication methods.

capabilities.name: manage_policies
capabilities.description: Create, read, update, and delete access control policies.

capabilities.name: encrypt_decrypt_data
capabilities.description: Encrypt and decrypt data using Vault's Transit secrets engine.
